title: Lazy Herbini
description: A silky herbini dish featuring linguine pasta with a lazy sunday touch, vegan-friendly and perfect for those who don't want to spend too much time in the kitchen.
instructions: Cook linguine pasta according to package instructions until al dente. Drain and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add vegan butter and chopped garlic cloves, sautéing for about 1 minute.
Add cooked linguine pasta to the skillet along with fresh herbs and salt/pepper to taste. Toss well until all pasta is coated evenly with the mixture.
Transfer the mixture into a baking dish or oven-safe serving bowl. Bake in preheated oven for about 5-7 minutes, or until everything gets heated through and starts bubbling slightly at the edges.
Garnish with fresh parsley before serving.
